notes: Issue #50, investigated by Claude (Copilot budget exhausted). NO RECIPE AUTHORED — the proposed 'wayback over bssnews.net/news/president' route is NOT MECHANICALLY VIABLE. Evidence from the IA CDX: (1) the CATEGORY page bssnews.net/news/president has exactly ONE capture ever (2021), so the issue's idea of harvesting category snapshots over time has nothing to harvest — and note the engine's pagination: wayback treats each CDX capture as a SPEECH page, it does not fetch a listing capture and extract links from it, so a category-snapshot route would need an engine change regardless. (2) The CURRENT article permalink shape bssnews.net/news/<id> (what the live bgd_bss_president recipe scrapes) has ZERO archived captures. (3) BSS has changed permalink shapes over time — /news-Details.php?cat=0&id=<id>&date=YYYY-MM-DD (~2016) -> /news-flash/<id> (2021-2026: 3652 captures, 2023 alone 2886) -> /news/<id> (current) — and the only well-archived shape, /news-flash/<id>, carries NO category signal in the URL, so presidential items cannot be selected by link_pattern; a harvest would pull ~3650 mostly-irrelevant wire stories (samples: 'Bangladesh-reports-N-fresh-cases', 'Moderna-submits-application-to-US-regulators', 'Taiwan-receives-first-batch'). Only a handful of captures carry a slug, so a slug-based president filter recovers almost nothing. CONCLUSION: Bangladesh history needs a DIFFERENT source, not a BSS wayback recipe. NEXT LEADS (per the issue): Press Information Department pressinform.gov.bd, or the Cabinet Division — neither surveyed in this session. The live bgd_bss_president recipe remains valid as a recent-only/incremental source (~25 items). The official bangabhaban.gov.bd stays intractable (legacy-Bijoy-font Bangla PDFs -> gibberish text). country=Bangladesh; source_url=https://www.bssnews.net/news/president; source_name=bssnews.net (via Internet Archive); source_type=official_gov; region=Asia; iso3n=50; content_format=fulltext.
